This directory vendors the local Ollama artifacts for `qwen2.5-coder:0.5b`.

Contents:
- `manifests/registry.ollama.ai/library/qwen2.5-coder/0.5b`: original Ollama manifest
- `blobs/sha256-20693aeb02c63304e263a72453b6ab89e1c700a87c6948cac523ac1e6f7cade0`: model weights tracked with Git LFS
- additional small metadata blobs referenced by the manifest

These files were copied from `C:\Users\alber\.ollama\models` so the exact local model payload can be preserved in GitHub.
